title: Lucky Strike: Two Hours of Bowling + Included Shoe Rentals for 2, 4, or 6 Guests (Up to 72% Off)

highlights: Two Hours of Discounted Bowling for 2, 4, or 6 People, Includes Free Shoe Rental
Valid at Lucky Strike locations, listedhere.
Includes free shoe rentals for each guest!
Each voucher is good for one lane.
Please checkluckystrikeent.comprior to your visit to confirm each center’s hours of operation.
Not valid until 24 hours after purchase.
Not valid on Saturdays after 6 PM.

faqs.question: How much is bowling at Lucky Strike with this Groupon deal?
faqs.answer: This Lucky Strike Groupon starts at $40 for two people, $64 for four, or $87 for six — each option includes two full hours of bowling plus free shoe rental. That's up to 72% off regular Lucky Strike bowling prices. One voucher covers one lane, so your group plays together.

faqs.question: What's included in the Lucky Strike bowling deal?
faqs.answer: Two hours of lane time and free shoe rentals for every guest in your party. Lucky Strike venues also feature arcades, billiards, a lounge with HD TVs, and a full food and drink menu. The voucher covers your bowling and shoes — food, drinks, and other activities are available to purchase separately.

faqs.question: Where can I find a Lucky Strike bowling location for this deal?
faqs.answer: Lucky Strike has locations across the country — the deal page links to the full list of participating venues. Before purchasing, check that a Lucky Strike near you is included. Each location sets its own hours, so visit luckystrikeent.com to confirm when your preferred spot is open.

faqs.question: Is there a Lucky Strike promo code, or how does the discount work?
faqs.answer: There's no separate promo code to enter. When you purchase this Lucky Strike deal on Groupon, you receive a voucher directly. Present that voucher — on your phone or printed — at any participating Lucky Strike location, and the discount is applied automatically. The voucher activates 24 hours after purchase.

faqs.question: Are there blackout dates or time restrictions for Lucky Strike coupons?
faqs.answer: Two main restrictions: the voucher isn't valid on Saturdays after 6 PM, and it doesn't activate until 24 hours after purchase. No advance reservations are available with this offer. The offer stays valid through June 25, 2026, giving you months to find the right time. Calling ahead to check lane availability is always smart.

faqs.question: Is Lucky Strike a good spot for a group outing or date night?
faqs.answer: Lucky Strike leans more upscale than a typical bowling alley — think sleek lanes, black-light ambiance, and a lounge atmosphere. It works well for date nights, friend groups, and family outings alike. With a 4.8-star rating from nearly 4,000 reviews, guests regularly call it out for the fun atmosphere and easy Groupon redemption.

faqs.question: How does Lucky Strike bowling cost compare to walk-in pricing?
faqs.answer: Walk-in Lucky Strike bowling prices vary by location and time slot, but the Groupon rate locks in at $40 for two guests, $64 for four, or $87 for six with shoes included. That comes out to roughly $14-20 per person for two hours. Without the deal, you'd typically pay more per person plus separate shoe rental fees — the savings add up fast for larger groups.

images.quality_assessment: Strong image portfolio with 50 total images demonstrating comprehensive coverage. Alt texts include descriptive primary images (7 hero shots with full title), lifestyle context (Bowling, Arcade, Food imagery repeated), and competitive comparison context (AMF Bowling, Bowlero, San Dee Lanes alternatives). However, alt texts are somewhat generic and repetitive rather than benefit-focused descriptions that highlight ambiance or group experiences.
